Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}What's wrong? You all hungry or something?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}I wish I could go to the beach. Hot sand, cool breeze... babes in bikinis...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 4 21 3 7}Man, a break like that sure would be nice![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}Somewhere in the south, where the water is crystal clear![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 6 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}But starting tomorrow, we gotta get through our exams... Aw man, this sucks.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}But it would be nice to go somewhere with beautiful beaches. Like Okinawa![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}Well, it's not Okinawa, but how about Yakushima?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}Mr. Chairman. I didn't realize you were here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}I happened to be in the area, so I thought I'd drop by and tell you my schedule for next week.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}Oh, Kirijo-kun. Your father will be vacationing in Yakushima during the break.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}You'll all have some time off after exams, right? Why don't you go and get a nice change of scenery?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}Seriously? We're gonna go on a trip!?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 1 25 25}YESSS! Beaches and bikinis! Beaches and bikinis![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}Well... My father is a busy man. I don't want to ruin his vacation.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}No father would be upset with a daughter who came all that way to see him.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}{f 4 23 0 222 0 25 25}You've all done a great job. You deserve to relax for a while.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}And we already know when the next operation will be, so I think it'll be fine.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}{f 4 23 0 5 1 25 25}I guess everyone needs a break now and then. Let's do it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 39 0 0}I should design a special training regimen.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 41 0 0}Oh, I need to go buy a swimsuit.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 42 0 0}Hey, don't worry! I got one you can borrow![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_033_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 44 0 0}Are you going to swim too, Mr. Chairman?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_034_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 45 0 0}I'm afraid I can't. I'll turn to dust if I'm exposed to sunlight.[n]{f 1 1}
